entries.name: Ice Barrier
entries.desc:
Shields you with ice, absorbing 9,165 damage for 1 min.

Melee attacks against you reduce the attacker's movement speed by 50%.

entries.name: Alter Time
entries.desc: Alters the fabric of time, returning you to your current location and health when cast a second time, or after 10 sec. Effect negated by long distance or death.

entries.name: Ice Block
entries.desc:
Encases you in a block of ice, protecting you from all attacks and damage for 10 sec, but during that time you cannot attack, move, or cast spells.

Causes Hypothermia, preventing you from recasting Ice Block for 30 sec.

entries.name: Time Walk
entries.desc: Alter Time resets the cooldown of Blink and Shimmer when you return to your original location.

entries.name: Temporal Realignment
entries.desc: Upon dropping below 25% health, your past self corrects your timeline, casting Alter Time and instantly returning 50% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Master of Time
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Alter Time by 5 sec.

entries.name: Winter's Protection
entries.desc: The cooldown of Ice Block is reduced by 30 sec.

entries.name: Frost Conditioning
entries.desc: Hypothermia's duration is reduced by 10 sec.

entries.name: Arcane Warding
entries.desc: Reduces magic damage taken by 4%.

entries.name: Inspired Intellect
entries.desc: Arcane Intellect grants you an additional 2% Intellect.

entries.name: Mirror Image
entries.desc:
Creates 3 copies of you nearby for 15 sec, which cast spells and attack your enemies. While active, you generate significantly reduced threat.

Taking direct damage will cause one of your images to dissipate

entries.name: Spellsteal
entries.desc: Steals a beneficial magic effect from the target. This effect lasts a maximum of 2 min.

entries.name: Quick Witted
entries.desc: Counterspell's cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

entries.name: Dragon's Breath
entries.desc: Enemies in a 12 yd cone in front of you take 264 Fire damage and are disoriented for 4 sec. Damage will cancel the effect.

entries.name: Supernova
entries.desc: Pulses arcane energy around the target enemy or ally, dealing 169 Arcane damage to all enemies within 8 yds, and knocking them upward. A primary enemy target will take 100% increased damage.

entries.name: Remove Curse
entries.desc: Removes all Curses from a friendly target.

entries.name: Improved Conjuration
entries.desc: Mirror Image's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.

entries.name: Improved Spellsteal
entries.desc: Spellsteal repeats its effect after 4 sec, but it now has a cooldown of 4.0 sec.

entries.name: Shimmer
entries.desc: Teleports you 20 yds forward, unless something is in the way. Unaffected by the global cooldown and castable while casting.

entries.name: Improved Blink
entries.desc: Blink's cooldown is reduced by 2 sec.

entries.name: Improved Counterspell
entries.desc: Counterspell prevents casting for an additional 1.0 sec.

entries.name: Overflowing Energy
entries.desc:
Each time your Arcane Barrage fails to critically strike, it gains 10% increased critical strike chance.

Critical strike bonus is removed when the affected spell critically strikes.

entries.name: Improved Remove Curse
entries.desc: Casting Remove Curse on a friendly target also casts it on yourself, but its cooldown is increased by 20 sec.

entries.name: Greater Invisibility
entries.desc: Makes you invisible and untargetable for 20 sec, removing all threat. Any action taken cancels this effect.

entries.name: Improved Frost Nova
entries.desc: Frost Nova duration is increased by 2 sec.

entries.name: Ice Ward
entries.desc: Frost Nova now has 2 charges.

entries.name: Captured Thoughts
entries.desc: The duration of Clearcasting is increased by 10 sec.

entries.name: Tome of Rhonin
entries.desc: Increases critical strike chance by 2%.

entries.name: Tome of Antonidas
entries.desc: Increases Haste by 2%.

entries.name: Incantation of Swiftness
entries.desc: Invisibility increases your movement speed by 20% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Master of Escape
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Invisibility by 60 sec.

entries.name: Charm of Aegwynn
entries.desc: The critical strike damage of your spells is increased by 5%.

entries.name: Brainstorm
entries.desc: Gaining Clearcasting increases your Intellect by 1% for 8 sec. Multiple instances may overlap.

entries.name: Flow of Time
entries.desc: The cooldowns of Blink and Shimmer are reduced by 3 sec.

entries.name: Mana Confluence
entries.desc: Your mana costs are reduced by 5%.

entries.name: Charm of Medivh
entries.desc: Your Mastery is increased by 3%.

entries.name: Permafrost Bauble
entries.desc: The cooldown of Ice Block and Ice Cold are reduced by 30 sec.

entries.name: Freezing Cold
entries.desc:
Enemies hit by Cone of Cold are frozen in place for 5 sec instead of snared.

When your roots expire or are dispelled, your target is snared by 80%, decaying over 3 sec.

entries.name: Ice Nova
entries.desc: Causes a whirl of icy wind around the enemy, dealing 547 Frost damage to the target and all other enemies within 8 yds, freezing them in place for 2 sec. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Time Manipulation
entries.desc: The cooldown of your loss of control spells are reduced by 5 sec.

entries.name: Ring of Frost
entries.desc:
Summons a Ring of Frost for 10 sec at the target location. Enemies entering the ring are incapacitated for 10 sec. Limit 10 targets.

When the incapacitate expires, enemies are slowed by 65% for 4 sec.

entries.name: Mass Polymorph
entries.desc:
Transforms all enemies within 10 yards into sheep, wandering around incapacitated for 15 sec. While affected, the victims cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect.

Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters.

entries.name: Energized Barriers
entries.desc: Casting your barrier removes all snare effects.

entries.name: Mass Invisibility
entries.desc:
You and your allies within 40 yards instantly become invisible for 12 sec. Taking any action will cancel the effect.

Does not affect allies in combat.

entries.name: Barrier Diffusion
entries.desc: When your Barrier is removed, reduce its cooldown by 5 sec.

entries.name: Ice Cold
entries.desc: Ice Block now reduces all damage taken by 70% for 6 sec but no longer grants Immunity, prevents movement, attacks, or casting spells. Does not incur the Global Cooldown.

entries.name: Spatial Manipulation
entries.desc: Blink gains an additional charge.

entries.name: Reflection
entries.desc:
After casting Blink, it is replaced with Reflection for 8 sec.

 Reflection
Teleports you back to where you last Blinked. Castable while casting and unaffected by the global cooldown.

entries.name: Improved Ice Barrier
entries.desc: Ice Barrier reduces your physical damage taken by 10% and absorbs an additional 5% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Ice Lance
entries.desc:
Quickly fling a shard of ice at the target, dealing 739 Frost damage.

Shatters 4 stacks of Freezing.

entries.name: Blizzard
entries.desc:
Ice shards pelt the target area, dealing 1,382 Frost damage over 10.7 sec and reducing movement speed by 50% for 3 sec.

This spell is cast at a selected location

entries.name: Blizzard
entries.desc:
Ice shards pelt the target area, dealing 1,410 Frost damage over 10.7 sec and reducing movement speed by 50% for 3 sec.

This spell is cast at your target.

entries.name: Fingers of Frost
entries.desc:
Frostbolt has a 15% chance to grant a charge of Fingers of Frost.

Fingers of Frost causes your next Ice Lance to deal Shatter damage equal to 4 stacks of Freezing and does not consume Freezing stacks.

Maximum 2 charges.

entries.name: Frostbite
entries.desc:
When Frostbolt critically strikes, it applies 1 additional stack of Freezing.

Each stack of Freezing that you Shatter deals 89 damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

entries.name: Icicles
entries.desc:
While in combat, Frost crystallizes around you, generating an Icicle every 5.4 sec. Upon generating 5 Icicles, Frostbolt upgrades to Glacial Spike for its next cast.

 Glacial Spike
Conjures a massive spike of ice that impales your target, dealing 5,181 damage and slowing the target's movement speed by 50% for 8 sec.

Applies 3 stacks of Freezing.

entries.name: Flurry
entries.desc:
Unleash a flurry of ice, striking the target 3 times for a total of 1,535 Frost damage.

Applies 3 stacks of Freezing.

entries.name: Cold Snap
entries.desc: Resets the cooldown of your Ice Barrier, Frost Nova, Cone of Cold, Ice Cold, and Ice Block.

entries.name: Glacial Bulwark
entries.desc: Ice Block and Ice Barrier now have an additional charge.

entries.name: Frozen Orb
entries.desc:
Launches an orb of swirling ice in front of you, dealing up to 5,485 Frost damage to all enemies it passes through over 15 sec. After a short delay, Frozen Orb will pursue its target. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

Enemies damaged by the Frozen Orb are slowed by 50% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Brain Freeze
entries.desc: Frostbolt has a 25% chance to reset the remaining cooldown on Flurry and cause your next Flurry to deal 50% increased damage.

entries.name: Piercing Cold
entries.desc: Frostbolt and Flurry critical strike damage increased by 20%.

entries.name: Ray of Frost
entries.desc:
Channel an icy beam at the enemy for 3.6 sec, dealing 1,795 Frost damage every 0.45 sec.

Applies 8 stacks of Freezing over its duration.

entries.name: Everlasting Frost
entries.desc:
Casting Frozen Orb grants 1 stack of Fingers of Frost.

Damaging one or more enemies with Frozen Orb has a 3% chance to grant Fingers of Frost.

entries.name: Permafrost Lances
entries.desc: Frozen Orb increases Shatter's damage by 10% for its duration.

entries.name: Frozen Touch
entries.desc: Frostbolt grants you Fingers of Frost 25% more often and Brain Freeze 20% more often.

entries.name: Splitting Ice
entries.desc: Your Flurry and Frostbolt spells strike 1 additional target at 80% effectiveness.

entries.name: Flash Freeze
entries.desc: Casting Glacial Spike has a 100% chance to grant you Fingers of Frost.

entries.name: Splintering Ray
entries.desc: Ray of Frost deals 30% of its damage to 5 nearby enemies.

entries.name: Frigid Focus
entries.desc: Ray of Frost damage increased by 30%.

entries.name: Winter's Blessing
entries.desc:
Your Haste is increased by 3%.

You gain 5% more Haste from all sources of Haste.

entries.name: Freezing Rain
entries.desc:
Frozen Orb makes Blizzard instant cast.

Blizzard damage increased by 20%.

entries.name: Cone of Frost
entries.desc: Cone of Cold now applies 3 stacks of Freezing to up to 5 enemies.

entries.name: Fractured Frost
entries.desc: Ice Lance strikes 1 additional target at 100% effectiveness, preferring enemies with more stacks of Freezing.

entries.name: Improved Shatter
entries.desc: Shatter damage has a 50% increased chance to critically strike.

entries.name: Deep Shatter
entries.desc: Shatter's critical strike damage is increased by 50% of your critical strike chance.

entries.name: Wintertide
entries.desc: Frozen Orb has a 100% chance to grant Brain Freeze.

entries.name: White Out
entries.desc: Ice Lance reduces the cooldown of Frozen Orb by 0.5 sec, increased by 0.1 sec for each stack of Freezing Shattered.

entries.name: Glacial Attunement
entries.desc: Flurry and Blizzard damage increased by 10%.

entries.name: Heart of Ice
entries.desc: Ice Lance Shatters 1 additional stack of Freezing.

entries.name: Rimecaster
entries.desc: Frostbolt and Glacial Spike damage increased by 10%.

entries.name: Freezing Winds
entries.desc: Shattering enemies inside your Blizzard increases Shatter's area damage by 15%.

entries.name: Improved Flurry
entries.desc: Flurry fires 1 additional missile.

entries.name: Glacial Assault
entries.desc:
Flurry has a 12% chance each hit to call down an icy comet, crashing into your target and nearby enemies for 598 Frost damage.

Applies 1 stack of Freezing.

entries.name: Crystalline Refraction
entries.desc: Ray of Frost generates 2 stacks of Fingers of Frost over its duration.

entries.name: Summon Water Elemental
entries.desc: Summons a Water Elemental to follow and fight for you.

entries.name: Lonely Winter
entries.desc: Spell damage increased by 3%.

entries.name: Glacial Chill
entries.desc: Glacial Spike deals 5% increased damage and applies 2 additional stacks of Freezing.

entries.name: Glacial Shatter
entries.desc: Glacial Spike no longer applies Freezing, and instead Shatters 5 stacks of Freezing.

entries.name: Hailstones
entries.desc: The time it takes to generate an Icicle is reduced by 1.0 sec.

entries.name: Thermal Void
entries.desc: Consuming Brain Freeze has a 100% chance to cause your next Ice Lance to Shatter 4 additional stacks of Freezing.

entries.name: Glaciate
entries.desc: When Ice Lance Shatters a stack of Freezing, the cooldown of Ray of Frost is reduced by 0.10 sec.

entries.name: Comet Storm
entries.desc:
Casting Ray of Frost replaces your Ray of Frost with Comet Storm, calling down a series of 7 icy comets on and around the target, that deals up to 2,429 Frost damage to all enemies within 8 yds of its impacts.

Each Comet Shatters 1 stack of Freezing.

entries.name: Hand of Frost
entries.desc: Shattering an enemy has a 10% chance to summon a Hand of Frost to pursue your target, dealing 2,304 Frost damage and applying 1 stack of Freezing on contact.

entries.name: Splinterstorm
entries.desc:
Casting Arcane Surge generates 8 Arcane Splinters.

During Arcane Surge, your chance to conjure an additional Arcane Splinter is increased to 100%.

entries.name: Spellfrost Teachings
entries.desc: Direct damage from Arcane Splinters reduces the cooldown of Arcane Orb by 0.25 sec.

entries.name: Controlled Instincts
entries.desc: 40% of the direct damage dealt by an Arcane Splinter is also dealt to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

entries.name: Signature Spell
entries.desc:
Arcane Blast and Arcane Pulse damage increased by 15%.

Casting Touch of the Magi conjures 4 Arcane Splinters.

entries.name: Archmage's Wrath
entries.desc:
Arcane Surge damage increased by 30%.

Your chance to gain Clearcasting is increased by 3%.

entries.name: Slippery Slinging
entries.desc: You have 40% increased movement speed during Alter Time.

entries.name: Look Again
entries.desc: While in combat, Blink summons a Mirror Image at your previous location.

entries.name: Reactive Barrier
entries.desc:
Your Prismatic Barrier can absorb up to 25% more damage based on your missing Health.

Max effectiveness when under 25% health.

entries.name: Phantasmal Image
entries.desc: Your Mirror Image summons 1 extra clone.

entries.name: Splintering Orbs
entries.desc:
Enemies damaged by your Arcane Orb conjure 2 Arcane Splinters, up to 4.

Arcane Orb damage is increased by 10%.

entries.name: Augury Abounds
entries.desc: Conjuring one or more Arcane Splinters has a 10% chance to conjure a burst of 8 Arcane Splinters.

entries.name: Force of Will
entries.desc: Casting Arcane Barrage conjures an Arcane Splinter for every 5 Arcane Salvo stacks consumed.

entries.name: Splintering Sorcery
entries.desc:
Casting Arcane Blast or Arcane Pulse conjures an Arcane Splinter.

Arcane Splinter:
Conjure raw Arcane magic into a sharp projectile that deals 213 Arcane damage.

entries.name: Polished Focus
entries.desc:
Casting Arcane Barrage while at 20 or more Arcane Salvo stacks refunds 5 Arcane Salvo stacks.

Arcane Barrage damage increased by 15%.

entries.name: Infused Splinters
entries.desc:
Direct damage from Arcane Splinters have a 25% chance to grant 1 stack Arcane Salvo.

 Arcane Salvo
Increases the damage of your next Arcane Barrage by 3%.

entries.name: Attuned Familiar
entries.desc: Your Arcane Familiar has a 50% chance to conjure a Splinter alongside its Arcane Assault.

entries.name: Shifting Shards
entries.desc: Gaining Clearcasting conjures 2 Arcane Splinters.

entries.name: Flash Freezeburn
entries.desc:
Meteor's damage is increased by 25%.

Meteor now grants Frostfire Empowerment.

entries.name: Flame and Frost
entries.desc:
Ice Block and Ice Cold reset the cooldowns of your Fire spells.

Cauterize resets the cooldown of your Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than 4 minutes when it activates.

entries.name: Dualcasting Adept
entries.desc:
Your Frost and Fire spells deal 20% increased critical strike damage.

Ice Lance and Pyroblast  have their damage increased by 40%.

entries.name: Isothermic Core
entries.desc:
Meteor now also calls down a Comet Storm, dealing 2,557 Frost damage to nearby enemies.

Comet Storm now also calls down a Meteor, dealing 3,571 Fire damage to nearby enemies.

entries.name: Frostfire Bolt
entries.desc: Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing 1,037 Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional 96 Frostfire damage over 8 sec.

entries.name: Blast Radius
entries.desc: The damage of Meteor and Comet Storm is increased.

entries.name: Heat Sink
entries.desc: Flurry and Fire Blast now deal Frostfire damage and their damage is increased by 15%.

entries.name: Frostfire Infusion
entries.desc:
Frostfire Bolt has and additional 5% chance to grant Brain Freeze and its critical strike chance is increased by 15%.

The damage of your Frost spells and Fire spells are increased by 4%.

entries.name: Thermal Conditioning
entries.desc: Frostfire Bolt's cast time is reduced by 10%.

entries.name: Severe Temperatures
entries.desc: Frostfire Empowerment stacks 1 additional time and it causes Frostfire Bolt to explode for an additional 20% of its damage.

entries.name: Frostfire Empowerment
entries.desc:
Casting Frostfire spells has a 10% chance to activate Frostfire Empowerment, causing your next Frostfire Bolt to be instant cast, deal 60% increased damage, explode for 60% of its damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Damage from Frostfire Empowerment applies 1 stack of Freezing.

entries.name: Meltdown
entries.desc:
You melt slightly out of your Ice Block and Ice Cold, allowing you to move slowly during Ice Block and increasing your movement speed over time.

Ice Block and Ice Cold trigger a Blazing Barrier when they end.

entries.name: Elemental Conduit
entries.desc:
Meteor and Pyroblast now apply Ignite.

Your Haste is increased by 2%.

entries.name: Molten Chill
entries.desc: Your Frostfire spells apply Ignite at 10% increased effectiveness.

entries.name: Duality
entries.desc: Casting Glacial Spike also casts a Pyroblast, dealing 3,495 Fire damage.

entries.name: Frostfire Bolt
entries.desc: Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing 1,037 Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional 96 Frostfire damage over 8 sec.
